overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game (Starfield) showing a character in a blue and green outfit exiting a bathroom and walking through industrial metal corridors of a space station. The environment features futuristic fixtures, security checkpoints, and elevator banks with artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: small bathroom with sink and toilet

events.description: character turns toward the sliding door which begins to open

agents.ego_description: turning away from the sink and walking toward the bathroom exit door

futuristic white toilet with open lid
red cushioned bench against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a small enclosed bathroom with dark wood-paneled walls, a wall-mounted sink, and a futuristic toilet. The character turns away from the sink and approaches the sliding door at the far end of the room.

events.description: exits bathroom through sliding door into security checkpoint corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway into a metal-floored security area with gated sections

entered.detail: metal barred security gate blocking side passage

segments.scene_description: The character exits the bathroom through the sliding door into a security checkpoint area with metal flooring and barred gates. A 'No Weapons' sign is visible on the right wall as the character moves forward through the transition space.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator lobby with red industrial walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the corridor past elevator doors on both sides

entered.detail: white metal elevator doors with vertical windows
white metal elevator doors with vertical windows
red painted industrial metal wall panels
information sign mounted above the fire extinguisher

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wider elevator lobby with distinctive red metal walls and white elevator doors on both sides. The character continues walking forward past a fire extinguisher mounted on the far wall, moving deeper into the industrial corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character transitions from a cramped, wood-paneled interior into a wide, industrial space station corridor. It begins inside a small enclosed bathroom, where the character turns away from a wall-mounted sink to approach a sliding door. As the door opens, the camera follows the character out into a security checkpoint characterized by metal flooring, barred gates, and a no weapons sign. The scene then expands into a wider elevator lobby with striking red metal walls and white elevator doors lining the sides. Finally, the character continues walking forward past a wall-mounted fire extinguisher, moving deeper into the futuristic industrial hallway.
